chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. A. No. D – 472 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR KATCHA PESHI. None present for the applicant. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. present. -------- This criminal miscellaneous application is called for hearing. Neither the applicant nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. It appears that despite notice Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate is not in attendance without any intimation. Record reflects that since filing of this criminal miscellaneous application nobody is pursuing this criminal miscellaneous application diligently, therefore, we have no option but to dismiss this criminal miscellaneous application for non prosecution. Resultantly this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed for non-prosecution along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
